<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by vue-docgen-cli — do not edit. Source: src/components/CnStatsBlockWidget/CnStatsBlockWidget.vue -->

### Props

| Name            | Type      | Required | Default     | Description                                                                                                                   |
| --------------- | --------- | -------- | ----------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `dataSource`    | `object`  | ✓        | —           | Manifest dataSource block. See `useDataSource`. Required — a stats-block widget without a data source has no count to render. |
| `title`         | `string`  |          | `''`        | Block title (manifest `widgetDef.title`).                                                                                     |
| `countLabel`    | `string`  |          | `''`        | Label displayed next to the count.                                                                                            |
| `variant`       | `string`  |          | `'default'` | Color variant: default \| primary \| success \| warning \| error.                                                             |
| `showZeroCount` | `boolean` |          | `true`      | Whether to show 0 as a real count instead of the empty label.                                                                 |
| `horizontal`    | `boolean` |          | `false`     | Use horizontal layout (icon left, content right).                                                                             |
| `route`         | `union`   |          | `null`      | Vue-router location to navigate to on click. When set, the inner CnStatsBlock renders as a `<router-link>`.                   |
